findings.description: dependency-review job in ci.yml ran on all events (push+PR) with fail-on-severity:high — spec requires PR-only with moderate severity

decision: Added if: github.event_name == 'pull_request' guard and changed fail-on-severity from high to moderate

findings.description: PR #23 blocked by ruleset main-protection requiring obsolete 'Validate' status check — old ci.yml validate job was removed in consolidation

decision: Updated ruleset required_status_checks context from 'Validate' to 'CI / CI Complete' via API (HTTP 200)
